title: RocaLand
description: Modpack for an old version of Minecraft (1.12.2). Performance-Friendly. Has Classic mods that provide content like Technology, Magic, Dimensions and Much More!
body:
# ![RocaLand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69935327597710577c09a0f021e76e65a3a130ce.png)

A kitchen-sink modpack to play with your friends.🫂 

No quests, not many changes. Just get fun with friends.😊

<details>
<summary>Mod List 📜</summary>

- **Essential Mod** ready to use to play with friends.
- **AE2**, **Tinkers Construct** & **Galacticraft** _as technology._
- **Botania**, **Artifacts** & **Apotheosis** _as magic._
- **Biomes O' Plenty**, **Better Nether** & **Better End** _as biomes in each dimension._
- **The Aether** _as new dimension._
- **Mowzies Mobs**, **Depths of Madness** & **Into The Dungeons** _as new bosses._
- **Chisel And Bits** & **MrCrayfish's Furniture** _as construction._
- **Better Animals Plus** & **Not Enough Pets** _as new animals._
- _And so much more that give this modpack a unique style._

</details>

Why RocaLand? You'll never know.🗿

Updates pretty soon.❤️

<details>
<summary>Minimum Requirements 💻</summary>

### As Host: _(not fully tested)_
- 4 Core CPU
- 8GB RAM _(6 allocated)_
- Space in Disk _(depends the world)_
- Integrated Graphics 

### As Normal Player: _(tested)_
- 2 Core CPU _(2.4GHz)_
- 4GB RAM _(2 to 3 allocated)_
- Integrated Graphics 

</details>

Remember to specify **Biomes O' Plenty** 🌳 as the World Type when creating one.‼️

Need some help? Contact me [here](https://github.com/DaGoulden/General-Modpacks). 🔍

<details>
<summary>Links Cause of License 😶‍🌫️</summary>

- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ae2-extended-life
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs

</details>
